# nullplatform_action_specifications (Data Source)

Lists all action specifications for a given service specification

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    nullplatform = {
      source = "nullplatform/nullplatform"
    }
  }
}

provider "nullplatform" {}

# List all action specifications for the given service specification
data "nullplatform_action_specifications" "example" {
  service_specification_id = "4a4f6955-5ae0-40dc-a1de-e15e5cf41abb"
}

output "action_specifications" {
  value = data.nullplatform_action_specifications.example.action_specifications
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_specification_id` (String) ID of the service specification to list action specifications for.

### Read-Only

- `action_specifications` (List of Object) List of action specifications belonging to the service specification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--action_specifications))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--action_specifications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `action_specifications`

Read-Only:

- `annotations` (String)
- `icon` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `parameters` (String)
- `results` (String)
- `retryable` (Boolean)
- `slug` (String)
- `type` (String)
